title: VRE JupyterLab Extension
description: Settings for VRE notebook MIME sync and execution guard integration.

enabled.title: Enable VRE extension
enabled.description: Enable VRE MIME sync and execution guard behavior in notebook panels.

cellReadonlyDesignEnabled.title: Enable cell readonly design
cellReadonlyDesignEnabled.description: Lock already-executed VRE cells and apply executed-cell styling.
